name: threatbook-tdp
description: OctoBus package for ThreatBook TDP domain block and unblock APIs.

ThreatBook_TDP.ThreatBook_TDP/BlockDomai.name: block-domain
ThreatBook_TDP.ThreatBook_TDP/BlockDomai.description: Block one or more domains through ThreatBook TDP.

ThreatBook_TDP.ThreatBook_TDP/UnblockDom.name: unblock-domain
ThreatBook_TDP.ThreatBook_TDP/UnblockDom.description: Unblock one or more domains through ThreatBook TDP.
